title: Content Record Schema
description: Shape of a single content record keyed to an anatomical ID. Owned by Content. Authority: Architect.

kind.description: Citation category. Determines which other fields are meaningful (e.g. 'url' implies the url field; 'textbook' implies edition/page).

ref.description: Short reference string (e.g. 'Gray's Anatomy 41st ed.', 'Netter Atlas plate 178', or a DOI).

edition.description: Edition or version identifier where applicable.

url.description: URL when citation kind is 'url' or as supplement.

retrieved_at.description: Date URL was last retrieved (for url citations).

structure_id.description: Primary identifier of the anatomy-graph node this content describes. UBERON preferred per ADR 0004.

long_form.description: Full descriptive prose for the detail panel. Markdown allowed.

ta_latin_name.description: Terminologia Anatomica Latin term if applicable.

citations.description: At least one citation required for reviewed content.

confidence.description: Anatomist-review state. Only 'reviewed' ships to the user-facing app.

authored_by.description: Agent or human who drafted this record.

reviewed_by.description: Anatomist who reviewed; required when confidence='reviewed'.
